final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand promotional poster for RAN QIU with a warm autumnal atmosphere and poetic, serene visual experience.

Style/medium: needs a "东方美学 极简主义 自然诗意 温暖治愈" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 新中式 minimalist editorial photography, 宋画 ink-wash negative-space tradition, Kinfolk magazine warm-toned still-life visual language; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include generous negative space and shallow depth of field
Subject: must include natural autumnal elements as supporting motifs
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm, golden-hour autumnal atmosphere — exact scene is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, golden-light 金色时光 mood — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: must be #8B3A1E (深秋棕红) dominant, with #E8DCCB (米色) and #D4A574 (金棕色) as supporting tones; warm overall
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU" as the brand wordmark
Constraints: 
Avoid: cool tones, high contrast, busy compositions, dark or moody atmosphere
